params.name: Hun Min Jong Um
params.description:
On Apr 3, 1443 AD, Hun Min Jong Um samples were created to promote laws.
King Sejong created Hangul, a writing system for his people. Due to the suzerain language's complexity, King Sejong appointed scholars to compile Hun Min Jong Um, a guide for the Korean people to learn their own language.
